title: The Weavers of Oshun
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A deaf teenage weaver in a floating Lagos market discovers her tapestries can physically re-weave time, but each use unravels a thread from her own lifespan.
long_description: A deaf teenage weaver in a floating Lagos market discovers her tapestries can physically re-weave time, but each use unravels a thread from her own lifespan.
